prompt: Write a KQL query to find all internet-exposed servers in ExposureGraphNodes. I want to filter NodeProperties to show only nodes that have internet exposure flagged. Show me the node name, type, and the relevant exposure properties.
assertions: A doc fetch was attempted for ExposureGraphNodes — transcript shows a call to microsoft_docs_fetch with a learn.microsoft.com URL, OR a web fetch to raw.githubusercontent.com/MicrosoftDocs/defender-docs mentioning exposuregraphnodes, OR a web_read/WebFetch call to a learn.microsoft.com URL containing 'exposuregraphnodes'
The response includes a KQL query that references the ExposureGraphNodes table
The KQL query uses dynamic column access such as parse_json(), tostring(), or bag_keys() to work with NodeProperties
